Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 13 

237 = Legislated/Regulatory penalty. At least one remark code must be provided (may be comprised 
of either the NCPDP reject reason code, or remittance advice remark code that is not an ALERT.) 

238 = Claim spans eligible and ineligible periods of coverage, this is the reduction for the ineligible 
period. (Use only with group code PR) 

239 = Claim spans eligible and ineligible
